calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition Of Armadaprotective Services, Inc. For An Order For Pre-Commencement Discovery
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Atty. John Ksajikian, Esq. of Megeredchian Law Firm (Tel. 818.494.0473) for Luis LopezDiaz;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ARMADA PROTECTIVE SERVICES, INC.'S Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition Of Armada Protective Services, Inc. For An Order For Pre-Commencement Discovery.

Mr. Ksajikian stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge, counsel for Luis LopezDiaz (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Brief discussions are held. At the conclusion of discussions, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Petition GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Petitioner is authorized to take the deposition of Luis Amilcar Lopezdiaz, to request a physical examination of Lopezdiaz, and to propound requests for production of documents and serve related subpoenas for medical records. CCP 2035.010.

The moving party is to prepare and submit a proposed form of order and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Borrowman at the following email: sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition Of Armadaprotective Services, Inc. For An Order For Pre-Commencement Discovery
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Continued To Sep-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ARMADA PROTECTIVE SERVICES, INC.'s Verified Petition For An Order For Pre-Commencement Discovery.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is continued to September 20, 2022, to be heard on the court's discovery calendar (room 301) at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
